Chronology of every recorded fact about [[House of Blades]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 25''' — The House of Blades contains masterfully carved and varnished furniture.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 1''' — The Eldest Nye insisted on adding a graveyard to the House of Blades.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 2''' — Zakareth needs the House of Blades to be whole and behind him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 10''' — The House of Blades is a location where Ilana could have been safer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — The House of Blades is a faction that fights the City of Light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 19''' — The House of Blades provides powers to deal with physical threats.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 20''' — Indirial's mind opened as though he walked through the House of Blades.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 22''' — The House of Blades is a set of neat squares of smoothly polished tile.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 23''' — Indirial was in the hallway of the House of Blades.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — The House of Blades is the only neutral location where Simon, Alin, and Leah can meet without being observed.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
